text.title: Team Development Worked Example
text.summary: One complete worked `TeamDevelopmentReport` for a 5-person checkout squad diagnosed as Storming.

example.title: Storming team — full report end-to-end
example.note: Hits all six rules: confidence + evidence ≥ 2, charter co_authored false (draft), retro actions owned + dated, no names, every theme has ≥ 2 sprints, gap plan evaluates all four options.
